message:
feat(fs): add File System Access API polyfill for vscode.dev

- Add fs_polyfill.js with full File System Access API implementation
- Inject polyfill via Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument
- Implement Zig handlers for readdir, readfile, writefile, stat, mkdir
- Add security: allowed_fs_roots restricts access to user-selected dirs
- Enable FileSystemAccessAPI Chrome flags in launcher
- Fix memory leaks in cdp_pipe.zig (race condition on shutdown)
- Prioritize mouse events: click > wheel (60fps) > move (30fps)
